fields.description:
## Summary
Graduate `src/rebar/llm/workflow/lint_refs.py` (currently 870 LOC, over the 800 soft cap and grandfathered on the module-size gate) off the allowlist by extracting the self-contained single-`${{ }}`-expression reference validator into a new pure-stdlib leaf `src/rebar/llm/workflow/lint_expr.py`. This is a pure/mechanical refactor: no behavior, signature, or logic changes.

## Seam (existing call-graph cluster)
Move the expression-grammar + expression-validation cluster — `_ID`, `_NAME`, `_ALLOWED_EXPR`, `ENGINE_INJECTED_INPUTS`, `_OutputContract`, `_Scope`, `_validate_expression` (~137 LOC) — into `lint_expr.py`. The leaf imports only stdlib (`re`, `dataclasses`, `collections.abc.Mapping`); ZERO rebar imports (a true leaf). `_output_fields_map` STAYS in lint_refs because it pulls the step-contract library (`.executor.contract_for`, `.steps`); the shared regexes/constants used by staying functions (`_EXPR_RE`, `_ENV_RE`, `_LITERAL_ONLY_FIELDS`, `_PLACEHOLDER`) STAY.

## Back-compat
lint_refs re-imports the moved names for its own internal use (`_OutputContract`, `_Scope`, `_validate_expression`) and re-exports `ENGINE_INJECTED_INPUTS` (added to `__all__`) — `lint.py:27` and `tests/unit/workflow/test_contracts.py:19` import it via lint_refs. `_Scope`/`_OutputContract`/`_validate_expression` have no external importers.

## Deviation from docs/architecture.md
The offenders-table remedy row for `lint_refs.py` (docs/architecture.md, ~line 269) names a future `lint_contracts.py` seam and EXPLICITLY records that that seam is today SUB-FLOOR (the pure contract cluster is <100 LOC, below the 100-LOC leaf floor). This ticket does NOT take that stale seam; it takes the larger expression-validation seam (~137 LOC, inside [100,800]) which cleanly clears the floor. This ticket deletes that stale/superseded arch.md row (arch.md tracks active oversized modules; a resolved module's row is removed, not rewritten).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New leaf sized in [100,800]: `L=$(wc -l < src/rebar/llm/workflow/lint_expr.py); [ "$L" -ge 100 ] && [ "$L" -le 800 ]` exits 0.
- [ ] lint_refs under cap: `[ "$(wc -l < src/rebar/llm/workflow/lint_refs.py)" -le 800 ]` exits 0.
- [ ] Graduated off allowlist: `! grep -q 'lint_refs.py' .github/module-size-allowlist.txt` exits 0.
- [ ] Graduated off ceilings: `! grep -q 'lint_refs.py' .github/module-size-ceilings.txt` exits 0.
- [ ] arch.md remedy row deleted: `! grep -q 'lint_refs' docs/architecture.md` exits 0.
- [ ] Module-size contract stays consistent: `python -m pytest tests/unit/test_module_size_contract.py -q` exits 0.
- [ ] Back-compat re-exports + behavior unchanged: `python -m pytest tests/unit/workflow/test_contracts.py tests/unit/workflow/test_v2_ir.py tests/unit/workflow/test_editor_batch.py -q` exits 0.
- [ ] Lint/format clean: `make lint` prints 'All checks passed!' (exit 0).

## Testing plan
Pure/mechanical refactor (symbol move + re-export; no signature/logic change) — E5 testing-plan is not-applicable; the existing tests are the oracle.
